## 👋 Welcome to TimeMachineTrimmer Discussions!

This space is for the community to connect, share tips, ask questions, and help each other get the most out of TimeMachineTrimmer.

### 💬 What to post here

- **Questions** — stuck on something? Ask away.
- **Ideas & feature requests** — what would make the app better for you?
- **Tips & workflows** — how are you using TimeMachineTrimmer to manage your backups?
- **Reports** — share your experience with different macOS versions, Time Machine configurations, or disk setups.

### 🚀 Quick links

- [Releases & Downloads](https://github.com/ricardoleal/TimeMachineTrimmer/releases)
- [Report a Bug](https://github.com/ricardoleal/TimeMachineTrimmer/issues/new)
- [README](https://github.com/ricardoleal/TimeMachineTrimmer#readme)

### ⚠️ macOS 27 Golden Gate

TimeMachineTrimmer is currently tested on **macOS 26 Tahoe** only. macOS 27 support is being worked on. If you're running macOS 27, please share any issues you encounter here — your feedback helps prioritize fixes.

### 📖 Before posting

Search existing discussions and issues to see if your question has already been answered. Let's keep the community tidy and helpful for everyone.

Welcome aboard! 🎉
